overview: Jeskai Lessons is a three-color tempo deck that leverages card advantage and sorcery-speed recursion to control the board while maintaining pressure. By cycling through cheap spells and reusing key threats, the deck aims to outvalue opponents in the mid-to-late game. The inclusion of Gran-Gran and Accumulate Wisdom provides a powerful engine for recurring removal and finishers, allowing you to stabilize against aggressive strategies and grind out control matchups.
win_conditions: Winning via superior card advantage and resource depletion
Recurring key threats and finishers via Accumulate Wisdom and Gran-Gran
Applying consistent sorcery-speed pressure with Stormchaser's Talent and other spells
Outlasting opponents through efficient removal and board control

keep_criteria: Hands with early interaction or recursion engines
Mana bases that support three-color casting by turn three
Combinations of Accumulate Wisdom and cheap threats
Hands containing Gran-Gran or early removal
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early interaction or card draw
Mana bases with four or more lands
Hands without a clear path to turn two or three plays
Hands reliant solely on high-cost finishers

early_game: Play lands and cheap interaction to disrupt opponent's early strategy
Hold up mana for potential recursion or counterplay
Establish early board presence with low-cost threats
mid_game: Activate Gran-Gran to reuse removal and stabilize the board
Cast Accumulate Wisdom to filter for answers or finishers
Trade efficiently while preserving card advantage
late_game: Leverage recurring threats to overwhelm opponent's resources
Use sorcery-speed spells to dictate the game state
Push for damage while maintaining enough cards to respond to late-game threats

key_cards.name: Stormchaser's Talent
key_cards.role: Provides versatile spot removal and card advantage
key_cards.notes: Use to clear key threats while drawing a card, maintaining resource parity

key_cards.name: Accumulate Wisdom
key_cards.role: Core recursion engine for reusing spells and threats
key_cards.notes: Cast at sorcery speed to return high-impact cards to hand, enabling repeated value

key_cards.name: Gran-Gran
key_cards.role: Enables repeated casting of instants and sorceries
key_cards.notes: Hold up mana to activate its ability and recast removal or finishers, maximizing tempo

sequencing_tips: Prioritize holding up mana for recursion over committing to early plays
Cast Accumulate Wisdom before committing to board state changes
Use Gran-Gran's ability to recast removal after opponent commits resources
Balance aggression with card advantage to avoid running out of answers

matchups.advice: Focus on early interaction and stabilizing with Gran-Gran recursion
Race while maintaining card advantage through repeated removal
Apply consistent pressure and use recursion to outvalue their hand traps
